betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Wood-Burning Generator§f

§aThe simplest power source — burn anything burnable for early electricity.§f

The §bWood-Burning Generator§f is crafted at a crafting table, not the assembly. A cheap introduction to HE power.

§6Crafting§f:
Steel plates ×3, copper coils ×2, furnace, iron ingots at a crafting table.

§6Operation§f:
Place fuel in the top slot, flip the switch. 100kHE internal buffer. Automatically stops when full — no wasted fuel. Fuel turns to ash periodically (clear the bottom slot).

§6Bonuses§f:
§b• Logs§f: +300% burn time
§b• Wood§f: +100% burn time

§6Fluid Mode§f:
Click the arrow in GUI to burn flammable fluids instead. Note: 50% efficiency penalty vs dedicated fluid burners.

§eTip§f: Your first power source. Upgrade to stirling engine or steam once you need more.
